text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone believes that Grass Wonder rejects scouting offers because
she lacks the drive to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the racer I saw training doesn't look like someone who's simply
quiet and gentle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I want to know the true Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah... Good evening. What are you doing here at this late hour?
choice_data_list: Actually, I'd like to ask you that myself.
Actually, I'd like to ask you that myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I... Well, I lost track of time looking up at the night sky. Hehe, how
silly of me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I should return to the dormitory now... Was there anything you
needed of me? If not, then good night—
choice_data_list:
Are you really not accepting any scouting
offers?

Are you really not accepting any scouting
offers?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, that... I believe I've explained before that I'd refuse...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: A terrible shame though it may be, my mind is unchanged. I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well... Forgive me, but it's a personal matter... That's all I can say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't seem to want to explain, but I can still try to work the
answer out for myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I think back to that look in her eyes on the course, the blue flames
I saw hidden within. How she really feels...
choice_data_list:
Are you disappointed about placing second in
the tryouts?

Are you disappointed about placing second in
the tryouts?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What drew you to that conclusion?
choice_data_list: I saw your fighting spirit burning in your eyes.
I saw your fighting spirit burning in your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: My eyes?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You understood that... just from my eyes?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A Yamato Nadeshiko is always modest—a soft expression coupled
with a calm demeanor. She must always remain unflappable and
solemn.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: That is the ideal to which I strive, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I must confess, true serenity still eludes me. The anger I feel toward
my own weakness is not so easy to quell.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I decided to run of my own volition. The path I mean to master lies on the turf. And to reach its end, to win, I cannot afford to stop running.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So... I should never have relinquished my hold on victory... no matter
what the course of events.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And yet!
choice_data_list: You can't forgive yourself for losing?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...I cannot.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The moment I begin to yield, the path to victory will crumble. In such
a halfhearted state, I cannot in good conscience accept any offer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Put more plainly, I'm being selfish. It is simply my preference.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: My apologies, but I should leave—
choice_data_list:
All right. I'll come ask you again once you've
placed first.

All right. I'll come ask you again once you've
placed first.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Again? You mean to say, you intend on trying to scout me again?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You'll wait for months until I race in the next tryouts?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
How do I put this? Surely you can see I am... not the easiest racer to
deal with.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I never compromise, and once I've made a decision, I never change
my mind.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Because I was dissatisfied with my results, I've refused every offer just
so I can take on the tryouts one more time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Even knowing that, do you mean what you say? You will wait for me?
choice_data_list:
I want to help you in your uncompromising
pursuit of victory.

I want to help you in your uncompromising
pursuit of victory.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, are you absolutely sure? You do realize that should I keep
failing to achieve victory, you'll be left without a student to train?
choice_data_list:
Except you're definitely winning the next one,
no?

Except you're definitely winning the next one,
no?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, how remarkable. What can I say to that? Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I see you are skilled at motivating me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, several months later...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's going for it! She easily overtakes the lead and jumps
to first!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's ahead! What an astounding push! She's left the pack
behind—Grass Wonder takes first plaaace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder remains determined all the way up to her beautiful
finish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Afterward...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You got first, Graaass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm rather taken aback.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: What a huge lie! You can't fool me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, now you can debut with a clear conscience, right? Races are
gonna be so much hotter! Burning hot! Scorching! Mucho calienteee!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Grass! I'm so excited for the day we race together!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I look forward to it as well, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After responding to her rivals' words with a warm smile, Grass Wonder
approaches me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you for coming, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe... yes. I've been waiting.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I should formally introduce myself... My name is Grass Wonder. I hope
for your full guidance and support.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Please help me traverse the path I walk to its end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thus begin my days with the unwavering racer, Grass Wonder!
